commands.title: Lé Vibe: Chat Commands & Mentions Help

leVibe.lvibeCapMbDefault.markdownDescription: Default **`.lvibe/`** size cap (MB) for new workspaces when workspace policy does not override. **Null** uses stack default (**50 MB**). Range **10–500** per PRODUCT_SPEC §5.

leVibe.model.useRecommended.description: Use hardware-tier model from locked-model.json when true; otherwise use override tag.

leVibe.model.overrideTag.description: Ollama model tag (e.g. mistral:latest) when not using recommended.

leVibe.model.allowPullIfDiskOk.description: Allow pulling a larger model when disk checks pass (first-run / policy).

leVibe.ide.showChatCommandsHelp.markdownDescription: Show in-IDE help for **`/setup-workspace`**, **`/agent`**, and **`@role`** (maps to `.lvibe/agents/<id>/skill.md`).

leVibe.ide.showNewWorkspaceHints.description: Show welcome and workflow hints on first open of a new workspace.
